description:
Build a multi-layer world reference map in gvSIG Desktop. Create a view containing three Natural Earth shapefiles:
1. Countries (polygons): /home/ga/gvsig_data/countries/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp
2. Rivers (lines): /home/ga/gvsig_data/rivers/ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines.shp
3. Populated Places / Cities (points): /home/ga/gvsig_data/cities/ne_110m_populated_places.shp

Ensure all layers are visible and arranged in the correct draw order: countries on the bottom, rivers in the middle, and cities on top. Save the project as /home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/reference_map.gvsproj.
